title: Mace to Enchantments
description: Adds custom textures for each mace-related enchant on maces
body:
![enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19c0188a6b3dada569cc151856c34af5a0d8d31c.png)

 # **Mace to Enchantments**

> Ever get your breach mace and density mace confused? **Mace to Enchantments** is here to  help. Each mace has a different texture dependant on the specific enchantments that are on the mace, including density, wind burst, fire aspect and breach.

##  **Version Compatibility**

> Mace to Enchants on the current version supports 1.21.5 and above.
